title: mirabilis multiflora var. froebelii
intro: Mirabilis multiflora var. froebelii, also known as the "Froebel's Marsh Marigold", is a perennial plant species belonging to the family Polygonaceae, native to North America. The medicinal properties of Mirabilis multiflora var. froebelii include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. This plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, soothing sore throats, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Mirabilis multiflora var. froebelii can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
